ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., K, QB) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* The name of the real football team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* The birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* The height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The draft round the player was selected in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The draft pick number of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" INTEGER /* The year the player's contract expires */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* The current injury status of the player (e.g., Healthy, Injured, Questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Kicker, Quarterback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_abbreviation" TEXT /* A shorter abbreviation for the position (e.g., K for Kicker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week in the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "playoff_week" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the week is a playoff week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_weekly_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "current_score" REAL /* Current score of the player for the week */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score of the player for the week */,
  "actual_score" REAL /* Actual score of the player for the week */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between actual and predicted scores */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference between actual and predicted scores */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* The total fantasy points scored by the player for the week */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* The position the player was rostered as in the fantasy team */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* The team the player's real team played against */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the game (e.g., Sunny, Rainy, Snowy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weekly_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weekly_performance_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the owner account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the owner account was last updated */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the owner has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "is_starting" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player is starting for the week */,
  "is_bench" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player is on the bench for the week */,
  "is_injured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player is injured for the week */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* The position the player is rostered as in the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
